title: BSAMCH Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for 16 Senior Resident Posts
description: The Dr. Baba Saheb Ambedkar Hospital and Medical College (BSAMCH) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 16 Senior Resident Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MBBS, MD/MS, DNB, Post-graduation, or Diploma can apply for the BSAMCH Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview.
